summary: Iteration 45 - MANUTRIX ENTERPRISE consolidation (org_config central brain + unidades collection rename + numbering engine + plantas backward compat). All 21/21 backend tests PASS. Frontend OrgConfigPage renders all 5 tabs and persists changes through the API; UnidadesPage renders with empty-state and 'Nova Unidade' CTA; sidebar 'Unidades' link is active under INFRAESTRUTURA. No regressions observed on Dashboard/Ativos/OS/Inspeções routes.

minor.issue: Silently ignores non-string values AND any key not in DEFAULT_TERMINOLOGY (49-key whitelist). Caller gets 200 with no indication that part of the payload was dropped. Consider returning a list of unrecognized keys or 400.

Only accepts entidades already in DEFAULT_NUMERACAO (5 fixed keys). Adding a new entity later requires a code change. Also the {ano} placeholder is rendered as 4 digits but no validation that {empresa}/{tipo_abrev} are present in custom prefixo, so a malformed prefixo (e.g., '{foo}-') will raise KeyError 500 on gerar_numero.
No size/MIME validation. A 100MB file or non-image upload will be accepted. Suggest enforce <=5MB and check content_type startswith 'image/'.

issues: Recharts containers warn 'width(-1)/height(-1) should be > 0' on first render — pre-existing, no functional impact but pollutes the console.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Validate org_config/numeracao 'prefixo' placeholders to prevent KeyError 500 on gerar_numero if admin types a malformed pattern.
OPTIONAL: Enforce file size (<5MB) and MIME (image/*) on POST /api/org/config/logo and /favicon to avoid abuse.
OPTIONAL: Return list of unrecognized keys from PUT /org/config/terminologia (currently silently dropped).
OPTIONAL: Fix Recharts width=-1/height=-1 warnings by setting a min height on chart containers.
critical_code_review_comments: backend/routes/org.py:107 update_numeracao accepts a free-form 'prefixo' string from admin without validating placeholders; combined with str.format() in org_config.gerar_numero (line 232) any unknown placeholder ({foo}) will raise KeyError → 500 on the next number generation.

backend/routes/org.py:94 update_terminologia silently drops payload keys that aren't in DEFAULT_TERMINOLOGY (49-term whitelist) and non-string values. UI client has no way to know its writes were partial.
backend/routes/org.py:144 / :170 upload_logo & upload_favicon don't validate content_type or file size, write directly to disk/object store. Admin abuse risk.

backend/org_config.py:181 gerar_numero falls back to 'YYYY-00000' when padrao OR prefixo_empresa is missing; current default config sets prefixo_empresa to first 3 letters of org name, so for orgs with empty/numeric names the fallback silently activates. Consider warning at config seed.
backend/routes/org.py:241 list_unidades hard-codes .to_list(100); orgs with >100 unidades will be silently truncated. Pair with pagination or raise the limit.
backend/routes/org.py:266 update_unidade ignores fields not in the (codigo/nome/descricao/endereco) whitelist — fine, but no 400 returned, so callers think their other fields persisted.

frontend/src/App.js:7324 The 'Numeração' tab Save calls onSave(form) then unconditionally calls api.put('/org/config/preferencias',{prefixo_empresa: prefixo}) without awaiting — two parallel writes, last-one-wins; if the second fails toast.success still already fired.
frontend/src/App.js:7130 get('/org/config') doesn't handle 401/403 — page silently blanks for tecnicos who navigate to /admin/config via URL (no admin guard on the route itself).

Service Worker on the preview domain re-registers and triggers a reload on first navigation; this clears form state mid-test and likely also affects real users on first visit. Worth investigating SW update strategy (skipWaiting vs prompt).
seed_data_creation: Created and soft-deleted TEST_Unidade_Iter45 and TEST_Planta_BackCompat unidades via API. Updated org_config.identidade via UI test and reset back to default values via API after the run. org_config.tema/terminologia/numeracao/preferencias were modified by tests and left at last test values (non-destructive — main agent can re-seed if defaults are desired).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration45_org_config.py — covers all 5 org_config sections (GET/PUT + RBAC), unidades CRUD with soft-delete verification, plantas backward-compat via /api/plantas mirrors the unidades collection, numeração preview, and regression on login/dashboard/ativos/OS/inspeções. UI verified: OrgConfigPage at /admin/config renders all 5 tabs with data-testid='config-tab-{id}' and save buttons data-testid='config-save-{section}'; UnidadesPage at /unidades shows empty-state with Nova Unidade CTA. Sidebar 'Unidades' link is under INFRAESTRUTURA. Identidade was reset to defaults at end of run; tema/terminologia/numeracao/preferencias still hold test values (admin can re-set via UI). One pre-existing harmless warning: Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) on initial render.
